metadata.title: close-spec
metadata.description: Archive an OpenSpec change by name using the OpenSpec CLI.

command.goal:
Archive an OpenSpec change by name using the OpenSpec CLI.
## Usage
/close-spec <change-name>
## Inputs
- `<change-name>`: the OpenSpec change name to archive
## Owner
@robot-architect

step.step-content: Verify change exists before archive command.
Execute openspec archive from documentation directory.

safeguards-list.safeguards-item: Do not guess or auto-correct the change name.
Do not claim success when archive command fails.
Do not run archive unless the change exists.
